name: pidex
description: Codex-only fork of Running Pi with pidex naming and provider hardening.

scripts.check: bash ./scripts/guard-codex-only.sh && bash -n install.sh uninstall.sh scripts/doctor.sh scripts/smoke-test.sh scripts/release/public-readiness.sh scripts/delegate/codex.sh scripts/delegate/check-auth.sh scripts/metrics/record.sh scripts/metrics/summarize.sh scripts/pipeline/event.sh scripts/history/append.sh scripts/history/list.sh scripts/git-hooks/install-global.sh scripts/git-hooks/uninstall-global.sh scripts/git-hooks/global/pre-commit scripts/git-hooks/global/commit-msg scripts/git-hooks/lib/security-scan.sh && node scripts/compat/windows-audit.test.mjs && node --no-warnings dashboard/lib/server/sqlite-query.tdd.test.mjs && node --no-warnings scripts/dashboard/ingest.tdd.test.mjs && node scripts/project-context/init.tdd.test.mjs && node scripts/provider-limits/probe.tdd.test.mjs && node scripts/parallel-agents/status.tdd.test.mjs && node scripts/parallel-agents/run-lane.tdd.test.mjs && node scripts/metrics/metrics.tdd.test.mjs && node scripts/pipeline/event.tdd.test.mjs && node scripts/project-metadata/migrate-to-pidex-folder.tdd.test.mjs && node scripts/quality/report.tdd.test.mjs && node scripts/wiki/hygiene.tdd.test.mjs && node scripts/parity/python-node-parity.tdd.test.mjs && node --test dashboard/lib/server/context-md.tdd.test.mjs
